text.message: Huh?
Why would you steal from me, red?
You had more cards
Lol, blues got 2 cities, expansion and a metro soon. Steal from the leader
orange will get metrođ
which one?  i'm at level one for all.  lol
Lol all of em ofc
lol, watch out!
orange will runaway you all just look me
better production, better port, everything better
better expansion
but ok, sure
zero ore tho
Sure, but oj have been the one moving the robber the last couple of times
Dont think theyre gonna target themself
lol, why not wait to upgrade first.
also black is now better then me
Yeah, ill keep that in mind, next time i get to move the robber
my metro u said ;)
i thought it was mine, blue!
Lol yeah, didnt know youd fumble it so hard bud
not as hard as you i guess
yeah if you didnt table talked and 3 players every stole everything from me
for sure
Talked about blue there oj. Lol i talked to one person who stole from me when you were the only one with 2 cities and one improvement away from metro. If thats aggressive table talk i dont know
What to say
think you da queen of table talk blue.  lol.
Yeah
At least trying to be
u all give me cloth lol
